name: S & L Transportation
carrier_operation: Common carrier - paratransit (intrastate PA, Lehigh/Northampton/Carbon/Monroe counties)
entity_status: active (PA corporation per PA PUC filings; current PA DOS status not confirmed)
registry_source: PA Bulletin/PUC Doc 01-49 (Jan 12, 2001 application A-00116251); company name reflected as 'L & S Transportation, Incorporated' at 104 Hoffman Road, Wind Gap PA; PA Dept of State business entity search portal
notes: Input 'S & L Transportation' (MI) with Wind Gap PA address is an apparent name reversal; the carrier at 104 Hoffman Rd, Wind Gap, PA 18091 is L&S TRANSPORTATION, INCORPORATED. SAFER record now INACTIVE (USDOT 953640, MC-408336). State is listed as MI in source but address is PA; treat as PA carrier. Power units/drivers unavailable from inactive SAFER snapshot. Officer Linda Souerzops listed as President in PA filings.

name: M V Transportation
carrier_operation: Interstate, authorized for-hire passenger (paratransit, fixed-route, shuttle, school transport)
entity_status: active (CA-formed/operated; corporate parent operations in TX)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER USDOT 975853 (MV Transportation Inc); CA Secretary of State business search
notes: Input address 535 Harbor St, Morro Bay, CA 93442 is the Morro Bay Transit operating site contracted by the City of Morro Bay (since 2000) to MV Transportation Inc (HQ Dallas TX). USDOT 975853 belongs to the parent MV Transportation Inc; the Morro Bay site does not have its own USDOT carrier registration. Power units (722) and drivers (1,155) reflect the entire MV Transportation Inc carrier registration, NOT the Morro Bay location alone (which runs ~1 Runabout bus + 2 Molly Trolleys). Inc/founding date for the corporate entity not confirmed in this lookup; commonly stated as founded 1975.

name: First Med
inc_date: 1988 (per LinkedIn; not verified against state filings)
entity_status: active (parent First Med Inc, HQ 23378 Commerce Dr, Accomac, VA 23301)
registry_source: VA SCC Clerk's Information System (CIS) entity search; b2bhint Virginia listing entity ref 03437415
notes: No confident SAFER carrier match for a 'First Med' carrier at 513 Raleigh Rd, Clinton, NC 28328. SAFER keyword searches for FIRST MED / FIRST MED INC / FIRSTMED returned no records. The parent appears to be First Med Inc (Accomac, VA), founded 1988, described as largest private ambulance company in the Southeast (DC through SC). Many private ambulance operators do not register USDOT because intrastate ambulance service is generally exempt from FMCSA registration. Clinton NC site likely a regional EMS/NEMT branch. Fleet/driver counts not publicly disclosed.

name: AAA Medex
carrier_operation: Wheelchair / medical / handicapped & elderly transportation (intrastate AZ)
fmcsa_address: unknown (no direct SAFER record for AAA Medex; related corporate entities exist at 4525 E University Dr, Phoenix and 1001 S Sarnoff Dr, Tucson)
inc_date: 1987-12-03 (per BBB - AAA Full Transportation Inc, business started 1922-09-01)
entity_status: active (Arizona corporation - AAA Full Transportation Inc, parent of AAA MedEx brand)
registry_source: Arizona Corporation Commission eCorp business entity search; BBB profile for AAA Full Transportation Inc (file opened 1982-09-01); related FMCSA entries USDOT 1816891 (AAA Cab Services Inc dba AAA Full Transportation Systems) and USDOT 2101832 (AAA-1BUDE dba AZ-Executive Transportation)
notes: AAA Medex is a Tucson branded DBA/trade name operating under parent AAA Full Transportation Inc (HQ 4525 E University Dr, Phoenix). DBAs include Yellow Cab Co., AAA Cab Service Inc., Courier Cab, AAA Sedan Service, AAA MedEx Wheelchair and Medical Transportation. No SAFER record found under 'AAA Medex' name. Related USDOT 1816891 (AAA Cab Services Inc) - 1 power unit/1 driver, intrastate AZ, registration last updated 2008 - and USDOT 2101832 (AAA-1BUDE/AZ-Executive Transportation Tucson) - 4 power units/4 drivers, intrastate AZ, registration last updated 2010. Neither is a confident match for the 1055 E 18th St Tucson AAA Medex specifically; intrastate medical/wheelchair transport is often FMCSA-exempt.
